---
description: "Workspace instructions for the Statistics Calc Tkinter app"
applyTo: "**/*.py"
---
- Keep changes in Python and match the existing Tkinter code environment and style.
- Preserve original comments when editing; do not remove or rewrite them unless a code change requires it.
- Ask before guessing when behavior, intent, or requirements are unclear.
- If execution or validation is needed, ask the user to respond with RUN THE PROGRAM instead of running it yourself.
